hypothesis.title: Entropy condition exploratory comparison
hypothesis.statement: Responses may differ across explicitly recorded entropy conditions.
hypothesis.null_statement: No descriptive difference is established by this experiment alone.
hypothesis.success_criteria: Produce a complete, auditable evidence record for descriptive analysis.

configuration.note: Operating-system entropy; not a claim of specialised hardware randomness.

prompts.content: Explain the following concept clearly in two short paragraphs: {topic}

experiment.name: Local overnight entropy comparison
experiment.description: Balanced local descriptive run. OS entropy is labelled as OS entropy, not true randomness. The deterministic control denotes the reproducible PRNG stream and derived-seed sequence; LM Studio seed use remains best-effort and does not guarantee identical outputs.

prompt_variables.topic: the role of reproducibility in scientific research
